steps.title: Solve by taking square roots
steps.content:
Take the square root of both sides of $x^2 = 144$:
$$x = \pm\sqrt{144} = \pm 12$$
The two solutions are $x = 12$ and $x = -12$.

steps.title: Check the listed values
steps.content: The choices include $-12$, and $-12$ is one of the two solutions. Verify it directly: $$(-12)^2=144.$$

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: $-12$ is correct because $x=-12$ satisfies the equation, so the answer is Choice A.
